Your Calendars,
Always in Sync

Connect your Salesforce and Google accounts below. CalSync will automatically bring your Salesforce events into Google Calendar.

{{end}}

Sign in with Google to allow CalSync to add events to your calendar.

🎨

Event Color

Choose the color for your Salesforce events in Google Calendar. These match Google Calendar's built-in colors exactly. Default is Blueberry.

{{range .Colors}}
{{.Name}}
{{end}}
Selected: {{range .Colors}}{{if .Selected}}{{.Name}}{{end}}{{end}} ✓ Saved
🔄

Sync Now

{{if and .SFConnected .GoogleConnected}}

Both accounts are connected. Your Salesforce events will be synced to Google Calendar in your chosen color.

🕐 Last synced: {{.LastSync}} ⏭ Next sync: {{.NextSync}}
{{else}}

Connect both accounts above to start syncing your calendar.

{{end}}

AI Centre of Excellence

We empower our global community of instructors by integrating AI into their daily workflows — from training delivery to course ramp-ups.

🎯 Our Mission

The AI Centre of Excellence (ACE) is dedicated to transforming how Salesforce instructors work. We build intelligent tools that remove friction from day-to-day tasks, so our instructors can focus on what matters most — delivering world-class training experiences.

🔄

Real-time Sync

Salesforce calendar events flow directly into Google Calendar — always up to date.

🎨

Custom Colors

Choose any Google Calendar color for your synced events so they stand out at a glance.

🔒

Secure & Private

Your credentials never leave your machine. No data stored in the cloud.

⚡

Zero Setup

No installation required. Double-click and go — works on any Mac.

📬 Contact Us

Have questions or ideas? Reach out to the ACE team at nidhi.jain@salesforce.com. We'd love to hear from you.

💬 Share Your Feedback

Help us improve CalSync. Your feedback goes directly to the ACE team via Slack.

💬

Got feedback or a feature request?

Use our Slack workflow to send feedback directly to the ACE team. Follow the steps below:

1

Click Copy Link below to copy the workflow link.

2

Open Slack and paste the link into any message box.

3

Press Enter and click the link to open the feedback form.

Paste the link inside Slack to open the feedback form.

Built with ❤️ by the AI Centre of Excellence (ACE) · Salesforce
